answer:
The room area is 14.5 ft by 11.25 ft, which equals 163.125 sq ft or about 18.125 sq yd. With a 12-ft width, you need a 14.5-ft length, costing about $224.06; with a 15-ft width, you need an 11.25-ft length, costing about $199.99. Thus, the 15-ft width is more economical at $199.99.  

\boxed{A}
